mapper.select: select id, duration, deep_sleep, light_sleep, rem_sleep, date, user_id from sleep where user_id = #{userId} order by date desc
select id, duration, deep_sleep, light_sleep, rem_sleep, date, user_id from sleep where id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into sleep(duration, deep_sleep, light_sleep, rem_sleep, date, user_id) values(#{duration}, #{deep_sleep}, #{light_sleep}, #{rem_sleep}, #{date}, #{user_id})
mapper.update: update sleep set duration = #{duration}, deep_sleep = #{deep_sleep}, light_sleep = #{light_sleep}, rem_sleep = #{rem_sleep}, date = #{date} where id = #{id}
